betterquesting:10.desc:8:
If you want to put hammering on the given hammer, it will allow you to condense different types of ore varients (ie: stone and diorite) into their crushed varients at the expense of more inventory clutter. It's your choice. 

While fortune does work with this enchant, it is capped at a max of 2x the drop amount to keep it balanced with the macerator.
 
§4Crushed ore must be broken down again with a GT hard hammer to receive impure ore dust.
Resulting in nuggets instead of ingots.
It is not advised you use this enchant until you can smelt ore fast.
